response.justification: The candidate has relevant C++ experience, but the resume focuses more on other technologies and doesn't directly highlight experience with all the key technologies and security expertise required for the role.
strengths: Relevant C++ experience in past roles
Strong background in software development across multiple technologies
Experience with various programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience with all key technologies mentioned in the job description
Not enough emphasis on security expertise and industrial cybersecurity concepts
No clear indication of experience with Microsoft Azure cloud services

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience with key technologies
